core_arc: Child finds a secret or hidden place and explores it.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.FRIEND: Friend or sibling who joins the discovery
personalisation_slots.LOCATION: Where the discovery is — the garden, the woods, behind the shed

scenes.outline: [NAME] was playing in [LOCATION]. [NAME] went to a part that was never explored before.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] in [LOCATION], venturing into an unexplored area. Curious expression.

scenes.outline: [NAME] pushed back some leaves. There was something behind them! What could it be?
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] pushing aside foliage, glimpse of something hidden behind.

scenes.outline: It was a [SECRET_PLACE]! [NAME] could not believe it. 'Wow!' said [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] discovering [SECRET_PLACE], amazed expression, wonder in their eyes.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went to get [FRIEND]. '[FRIEND], come and see!' said [NAME]. They ran back together.

scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] looking at [SECRET_PLACE] together, both amazed.

scenes.outline: They explored the [SECRET_PLACE] together. They found so many interesting things.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] exploring, examining details, engaged and happy.

scenes.outline: 'This can be our secret place,' said [NAME]. [FRIEND] nodded. 'Just for us.'
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] making a pact, perhaps a pinky promise or handshake.

scenes.outline: [NAME] smiled. Having a secret discovery was the best. [NAME] could not wait to come back.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] leaving but looking back at the [SECRET_PLACE], contented smile.

comprehension_questions.inference: Why did [NAME] want to share the discovery with [FRIEND]?
comprehension_questions.prediction: What do you think [NAME] and [FRIEND] will do at their secret place?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: d, s, c. Copy the word: discover.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: secret, hidden, explore. What would you like to discover?
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about the [SECRET_PLACE]. Where would you like to explore?

dinosaurs.WONDER: There were footprints in the rock from long ago.

space.SECRET_PLACE: clearing where you can see all the stars
space.WONDER: At night you could see every star in the sky.

football.WONDER: The grass was flat and perfect for playing.

baking.WONDER: There were enough berries to make a pie.

nature.WONDER: The water made a lovely sound.

vehicles.WONDER: It was like a secret road.

music.WONDER: When you sang, the tree sang back.
